item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means (Not Officially read and referred until adoption of Introduction report).

item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: ❓Milt Harper - Student Orchestras of Greater Olympia
item.description: Milt Harper signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Student Orchestras of Greater Olympia.

item.title: 👍💵Grace Yuan - School Alliance
item.description: Grace Yuan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent School Alliance. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Charlie Brown - South Sound Superintendents, Federal Way School District
item.description: Charlie Brown signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent South Sound Superintendents, Federal Way School District.

item.title: Fiscal Cutoff Passes, Tuesday Marks Major Deadline - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Fiscal Cutoff Passes, Tuesday Marks Major Deadline - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: 👍David-Henry Sedelmeier - Driver Education Instructor
item.description: David-Henry Sedelmeier signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Driver Education Instructor.

item.title: 👍💵Clifford Traisman - Seattle, Bellevue, Highline, Northshore Public School Districts
item.description: Clifford Traisman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Seattle, Bellevue, Highline, Northshore Public School Districts. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Logan Noel-Endres - Washington State School Directors' Association (WSSDA)
item.description: Logan Noel-Endres signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State School Directors' Association (WSSDA).

item.title: 👍💵Marissa Rathbone - Washington Assn of School Administrators (WASA) & WA Assn of School Business Officials (WASBO)
item.description: Marissa Rathbone signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Assn of School Administrators (WASA) & WA Assn of School Business Officials (WASBO). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mary Templeton - School Alliance
item.description: Mary Templeton signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent School Alliance.

item.title: 👍Jo Moccia - Vashon Island School District
item.description: Jo Moccia signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Vashon Island School District.

item.title: 👍Jason Kuo - Washington State Music Teachers Association
item.description: Jason Kuo signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Music Teachers Association.

item.title: 👍Lance Goodpaster - Franklin Pierce Schools
item.description: Lance Goodpaster signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Franklin Pierce Schools.

item.title: 👍💵Braden Sigua - Pacific Science Center
item.description: Braden Sigua signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Pacific Science Center. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Tori Emerson - President, Washington State PTA
item.description: Tori Emerson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent President, Washington State PTA.

item.title: Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
